name: C2xTestJoinSignalMatch
title: C2xTestJoinSignalMatch
syntax: long C2xTestJoinSignalMatch (char* protocolDesignator, char* tokenDesignator, int64 tokenValue) // form 1
long C2xTestJoinSignalMatch (char* protocolDesignator, char* tokenDesignator, int64 tokenValue, char* stationName) // form 2
description: Completes the current set of joined events with the transmitted event. This function does not wait.

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Protocol designator of the Car2x message that should be awaited.

parameters.name: tokenDesignator
parameters.description: Token designator of the Car2x message that should be awaited.

parameters.name: tokenValue
parameters.description: Token value that should be awaited.

parameters.name: stationName
parameters.description: Name of the sender station of the Car2x message that should be awaited.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
